mission.title: vault: Regression: OIDC Login 'role with oidc role_type is not allowed'
mission.description: Regression: OIDC Login 'role with oidc role_type is not allowed'. Requested by 20+ users.

steps.title: Check current vault setup
steps.description:
Verify your vault version and configuration:
```bash
vault version
```
This feature requires a working vault installation.

steps.title: Review vault configuration
steps.description:
Review the relevant vault configuration:
Starting in 1.10.0, our OIDC login flow will error with `Authentication failed: role with oidc role_type is not allowed`

The popup window will go to Microsoft (in my case) which returns a 200, on the page that says "Completing the sign-in

steps.title: Apply the documented workaround for OIDC login regression
steps.description:
PR #14708 added a known-issue entry to the Vault 1.10 upgrade guide documenting this OIDC login regression. The workaround involves using the Vault CLI to log in via OIDC instead of the UI, or upgrading to a later Vault version where the regression was resolved.
```bash
# Use the CLI to log in via OIDC as a workaround
vault login -method=oidc role=default
```

steps.title: Upgrade vault to include the fix
steps.description:
If the fix is included in a newer release, upgrade vault:
```bash
# Check current version
vault version
# Follow the project's upgrade guide at https://github.com/hashicorp/vault
```

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected.
Confirm the feature described in "Regression: OIDC Login 'role with oidc role_type is not…" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary: This regression in Vault 1.10.0 prevented OIDC login via the UI. PR #14708 added a known-issue entry to the 1.10 upgrade guide documenting the issue and workaround (use CLI login instead of UI). The underlying bug was subsequently fixed in later Vault releases.
codeSnippets:
vault auth enable oidc
vault write auth/oidc/config -<<"EOH"
{
   "oidc_client_id": "your_client_id",
   "oidc_client_secret": "your_client_secret",
   "default_role": "default",
   "oidc_discovery_url": "https://login.microsoftonline.com/<snip>/v2.0",
   "oidc_response_mode": "form_post",
   "oidc_response_types": [
    "id_token"
   ],
   "provider_config": {
      "provider": "azure"
   }
}
EOH
vault write auth/oidc/role/default user_claim="preferred_username" allowed_redirect_uris="http://localhost:8250/oidc/callback,https://vault.example.com/ui/vault/auth/oidc/oidc/callback" groups_claim="groups" policies=default oidc_scopes="https://graph.microsoft.com/.default profile"

prerequisites.description: A working vault installation or development environment.
